geographic_restrictions: Primarily restricted to University of Virginia (UVA) faculty, staff, students, and postdoctoral researchers. Some opportunities may have broader eligibility or project-specific restrictions.
project_area: Biomedical research, clinical studies, translational research, medical education, equipment funding, and innovation in healthcare.
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; eligibility is primarily based on affiliation with UVA or specific roles (e.g., faculty, postdocs).
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by grant but generally includes UVA faculty, postdoctoral researchers, staff, or students. Some grants are open to trainees or have project-specific criteria. External grants may have additional restrictions based on the funding agency.
